precheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM pg_type t
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON t.typnamespace = n.oid
  WHERE n.nspname = 'public'
    AND t.typname = 'user_type'
)

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM pg_type t
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON t.typnamespace = n.oid
  WHERE n.nspname = 'public'
    AND t.typname = 'user_type'
)

label: Enforce NOT NULL for createdAt on user
summary: Sets NOT NULL on createdAt for table user

precheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'createdAt'
)

SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM "public"."user"
  WHERE "createdAt" IS NULL
  LIMIT 1
)

execute.sql:
ALTER TABLE "public"."user"
ALTER COLUMN "createdAt" SET NOT NULL

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'createdAt'
    AND is_nullable = 'NO'
)

label: Alter type for id on user
summary: Changes type of id to character(36)

precheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'id'
)

execute.sql:
ALTER TABLE "public"."user"
ALTER COLUMN "id"
TYPE character(36)
USING "id"::character(36)

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM pg_attribute a
  JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid = a.attrelid
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
  WHERE n.nspname = 'public'
    AND c.relname = 'user'
    AND a.attname = 'id'
    AND format_type(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod) = 'character(36)'
    AND NOT a.attisdropped
)

meta.detail: ALTER COLUMN TYPE requires a full table rewrite and acquires an ACCESS EXCLUSIVE lock. On large tables, this can cause significant downtime.

label: Create table post
summary: Creates table post with required columns

execute.sql:
CREATE TABLE "public"."post" (
  "createdAt" timestamptz DEFAULT (now()) NOT NULL,
  "embedding" vector,
  "id" character(36) NOT NULL,
  "title" text NOT NULL,
  "userId" text NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

label: Create FK-backing index post_userId_idx on post
summary: Creates FK-backing index post_userId_idx on post

label: Add foreign key post_userId_fkey on post
summary: Adds foreign key post_userId_fkey referencing user

precheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint c
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.connamespace = n.oid
  WHERE c.conname = 'post_userId_fkey'
  AND n.nspname = 'public'
)

execute.sql:
ALTER TABLE "public"."post"
ADD CONSTRAINT "post_userId_fkey"
FOREIGN KEY ("userId")
REFERENCES "public"."user" ("id")

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint c
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.connamespace = n.oid
  WHERE c.conname = 'post_userId_fkey'
  AND n.nspname = 'public'
)
